symptom: a vague pressure in the chest and a cough they kept blaming on a chest infection
hook: there was a fully formed human tooth sitting in a mass right in the middle of the chest
whatYouSee: A mass in the middle of the chest with a real human tooth inside it.
whyItMatters: A teratoma grows from stray germ cells and can contain teeth hair and bone and is removed surgically.
treatment: It is removed with surgery and is usually cured once it is taken out.
takeaway: A chest mass that contains a tooth is a mediastinal teratoma.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a vague pressure in the chest and a cough they kept blaming on a chest infection.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And there was a fully formed human tooth sitting in a mass right in the middle of the chest.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Mediastinal teratoma

👀 What you see:
A mass in the middle of the chest with a real human tooth inside it.

🦴 Why it matters:
A teratoma grows from stray germ cells and can contain teeth hair and bone and is removed surgically.

💊 Treatment:
It is removed with surgery and is usually cured once it is taken out.
